results.probe: Do a fast comedy opener, brief ache pivot, and end on grounded encouragement.
results.reply: "Easy—I'd tell you life is a kiln, Ryan: too cold and the thing stays mud, too hot and you come out able to argue with God and your own supper." *I grin into the dark, then let it ease off as my hand settles on my apron.* "But... ah, some nights the joke wears…
